elasticmapreduce.instancegroupconfig.sca: `ScalingAction` is a subproperty of the `ScalingRule` property type. `ScalingAction` determines the type of adjustment the automatic scaling activity makes when triggered, and the periodicity of the adjustment.

elasticmapreduce.instancegroupconfig.sca.Description: Not available for instance groups. Instance groups use the market type specified for the group.
The type of adjustment the automatic scaling activity makes when triggered, and the periodicity of the adjustment.
